enterEmail.title: Enter your email address
enterEmail.description: A verification email will be sent to this address.

enterCode.title: Enter verification code
enterCode.description: Check the verification code sent to your email.

enterNickname.title: Enter a nickname
enterNickname.description: Use 2 to 8 letters or numbers. (Excluding special characters)

trainingPuzzleSuccess.title: Puzzle Solved
trainingPuzzleSuccess.message:
Five in a row completed!
Reward: {{reward}} Pieces

trainingPuzzleFailure.title: Puzzle Failed
trainingPuzzleFailure.message: Failed to complete five in a row.

communityPuzzleFailure.title: Puzzle Failed
communityPuzzleFailure.message: Failed to complete five in a row.

rankingPuzzleFailure.message: Failed to complete five in a row.

validationComplete.title: Verification Success
validationComplete.message: Check the verified sequence and upload. If the sequence changes by clicking on the board, it will change to an uncertified state.

validationFailed.title: Verification Failed
validationFailed.message: You can still upload as an uncertified puzzle by entering the sequence.

puzzleUploadSuccess.title: Upload Successful
puzzleUploadSuccess.message: The puzzle has been successfully registered.

deletePuzzleConfirm.title: Delete Puzzle
deletePuzzleConfirm.message:
Are you sure you want to delete this puzzle?
It cannot be recovered after deletion.

rankingPuzzleIntro.title: Ranking Puzzle Rules
rankingPuzzleIntro.message:
Solve as many Renju puzzles as possible within 3 minutes to challenge the rankings.
However, if the AI completes five in a row first or you skip a puzzle, it will be treated as a failure. Play carefully to achieve your highest score

trainingPackPurchase.title: Purchase Training Pack
trainingPackPurchase.message:
Would you like to purchase this pack? ({{puzzleCount}} Puzzles)
Required Cost: {{price}} Pieces

puzzleReviewPurchase.title: Unlock Answer
puzzleReviewPurchase.message:
Would you like to view the answer?
Required Cost: {{price}} Pieces

nicknameChangePurchase.title: Change Nickname
nicknameChangePurchase.message:
Would you like to proceed with changing your nickname?
Required Cost: {{price}} Pieces

userDeleteConfirm.title: Delete Account
userDeleteConfirm.message:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
Your account cannot be recovered after deletion.

featureInProgress.title: Coming Soon
featureInProgress.message:
This feature is currently under development.
See you at the official launch!

networkError.title: Network Error
networkError.message:
Cannot connect to the server.
Check your internet connection.

home.trainingPuzzleDescription: A training ground with certified step-by-step puzzles
home.communityPuzzleDescription: A place to communicate and interact through user puzzles
home.rankingPuzzleDescription: A competitive arena to solve random puzzles within the time limit

puzzle.author: 's puzzle
puzzle.createDescription: Click on the board to create a puzzle. Pay attention to the order of black and white stones.
puzzle.verifyDescription: Get AI certification using the verify button. You can still publish even if it is not certified.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.ratingDescription: This is the rating score obtained from ranking puzzles. Up to the top 100 are displayed, and rankings are updated every hour.
ranking.bestDescription: Users who have actively influenced the Renzzle community over the past year through creating, solving, and popular puzzles. Up to the top 100 are displayed.

toast.numberProcessingError: An error occurred while processing the move.
toast.appStartError: An error occurred while starting the application.
toast.duplicatePuzzle: This puzzle already exists. Create a new one.
toast.nicknameAlreadyInUse: This nickname is already in use.
toast.missingRequiredFields: Required fields are missing. Returning to the beginning.
